scripts.generate:protocol: adi tsp-gen generate ../api.tsp -l typescript -s protocol --protocol-tag type --protocol-rename snake_case --protocol-enum-name CredentialsMessage -o src/generated
scripts.build: bun run generate && npm run generate:protocol && bun build src/index.ts --outdir ../../../../dist/adi.credentials --entry-naming 'web.[ext]' --format esm --minify --external '@adi-family/*'
